name: Otto Kretschmer
longDesc: Otto Kretschmer est un général navale de qualité or — Allemagne. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Ace Submarine
skills.desc: Submarine units under command (excluding nuclear submarines) ignores enemy defense, and their attack range is increased by 1; after eliminating an enemy, there is a X% chance to attack again, and the chance can be increased by an additional 25% if a critical attack is dealt.

skills.name: Submergence Evasion
skills.desc: Submarine units under command receive X% less damage and have a 50% chance to dodge when attacked by airstrike or missile. Submarine recover 5% of its maximum HP each turn.

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by X% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: X% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Sailor
skills.desc: Counter attack +X% when attacked by the enemy at sea

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4
